questions.text: What is the role of NEO in the context of intercompany accounting?
options: NEO is used only for Intercompany Accountant
NEO does not involve account accountants
NEO replaces multiple applications with a single app for certain tasks

questions.text: What does the NEO system replace in terms of reporting to Magnitude?
options: Use of csv/txt files for data extraction

questions.text: What is achieved through the harmonization of Master data in NEO?
options: Direct link between PCOA and OCOA only
Direct link between TCOA and GCOA only
Integration of TCOA and GCOA as a Magnitude account

questions.text: What feature does the embedded analytics provide in NEO?
options: Trial balance only by transaction currency
Direct view of the Magnitude account impact
Data split by partner without analytics

questions.text: What is the role of the GL accountant after the NEO implementation?
What feature does embedded analytics provide in NEO?
options: Trial balance by trading partner and transaction currency

questions.text: In the “Trial Balance” Fiori App, it is possible to check data by GCOA.
In the RTIC reporting, IG account can be split by partner and transaction currency
In NEO, there is only one App to export Magnitude data by reporting
In NEO, the harmonization of master data eliminates the need for PCOA
